title: VSafety Fire Exit Sign - Rigid Plastic Emergency Escape Route Marker with "Keep Clear" Text - Durable 300mm x 100mm Fire Extinguisher Sign, EN ISO Compliant, Green & White
features: Legal Compliance - This fire exit sign helps meet Health and Safety Regulations 1996. Safety exit signs mark escape routes, ensuring your workplace meets safety standards for staff and visitors

UK Standards - Our fire signs conforms to EN ISO 7010:2020 & Complies with BS 5499-2:1986 Fire safety signs, notices and graphic symbols specs with a green background and white pictogram, making this emergency exit sign instantly recognizable in emergency situations

Durable Construction – Made from sturdy 2mm rigid plastic, this fire safety sign is built to last. It resists wear and tear, ensuring visibility and legibility over time in both indoor and outdoor environments.

Clear Instructional Message – Features the bold “Fire Exit/Keep Clear Sign” text printed on a 300 x 100mm landscape sign ensures high visibility, making it easy to identify emergency exits in workplaces, warehouses, and commercial buildings.
Easy Installation - Lightweight and durable, this 2mm plastic sign can be easily positioned on a range of surfaces using your preferred mounting method, making it suitable for various environments.
description: From the manufacturer Ensure Safe Evacuation During Emergencies
